description: Defines valid status transitions in the PPW claim-promotion lifecycle. Authoritative state definitions are in schemas/claim-promotion.schema.json.

promotionStages.description: Corpus artifact identified but not yet extracted as a draft claim.
Claim text extracted from a corpus artifact; not yet reviewed.
Claim has passed source-level review and is eligible to advance toward promotion.
Claim promoted to a PPW finding; contributes to case scores. Requires reviewStatus human-reviewed or approved.
Claim cannot advance until listed blockers are resolved. Requires evidence refs or missingEvidenceReason.
Claim withdrawn from the promotion pipeline; no longer active.

reviewGates.description: Initial state; no review has occurred.
Bibliography source references verified as valid and sufficient.
Passage-level anchoring and evidentiary grounding verified.
Score impact assessed for consistency with existing PPW case scores.
Human reviewer has completed a full review pass across all gates.
Claim approved for promotion to promoted-finding.
Claim rejected; must return to draft-claim or be retired.
